title: pisum odoratum
intro: Pisum odoratum, also known as sweet pea, is a flowering legume plant that belongs to the genus Pisum and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its high concentration of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. Sweet pea is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of sweet pea include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
